title: UI: strict note-source mapping for score procedure/evaluation lists
description: Implement strict note source mapping: procedure notes from Procedure.description only; evaluation notes from evaluation.parameters.notes via EvaluationTaskData.parameters.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented strict notes mapping: procedure notes now sourced from Procedure.description only; evaluation notes passed via evaluation.parameters -> EvaluationTaskData.parameters. Added/updated focused tests and validated with dashboard typecheck.
